_publications._publicationTitle: Nf1 heterozygous mice recapitulate the anthropometric and metabolic features of human neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: Brown adipose mass was also reduced in Nf1 +/− mice when compared with WT mice (4.1 ± 1.6 mg/g vs. 7.1 ± 1.7 mg/g, p = 0.006)
details: Brown adipose mass reduced (4.1 ± 1.6 mg/g vs. 7.1 ± 1.7 mg/g, p = 0.006) compared to WT mice
